_publications._publicationTitle: HuR/ELAVL1 drives malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor growth and metastasis.

_contextSnippet: Importantly, i.p. injection with MS-444 (25 mg/kg body weight; treatment every 48 hours for 10 days) of nude mice bearing already established tumors...severely blunted tumor growth, and even led to tumor regression in some cases
details: i.p. injection with MS-444 (25 mg/kg body weight; treatment every 48 hours for 10 days) severely blunted tumor growth and led to tumor regression in some cases
